emails.subject: Index option
emails.body: Index option Stacey, the index option is showing just as a physical deal with a position. I am wondering if this is creating positions in Risk Trac because our peak position does not tie with the bench mark. The difference is close to the index option but not quite. John John Postlethwaite EPMI-West Power Risk Management 503-464-7756

emails.subject: RE: Index option
emails.body: RE: Index option There were some conversations regarding getting the Index Option into RisktRAC. It may be that they are not there yet. Zhiyun was working with the RAC IT, she would know the latest. Stacey To: White, Stacey W.

emails.subject: FW: index option
emails.body: FW: index option I cannot think of anything that would cause this to be incorrect. Please let me know if you agree and I will bless the change. Thanks, Stacey

emails.subject: RE: index option
emails.body: RE: index option I guess I am Pope for the day. The logic makes sense to me, but I would be hesitant in saying it is final. It's hard what still might be affected somewhere down the line but it's the best solution. John
